Getting started

Installation

Add rs-grid-leptos to your Cargo.toml: 

[dependencies]
rs-grid-leptos = { path = "../rs-grid-leptos" }

Build the WASM bundle with Trunk: 

cd examples/basic-leptos
trunk serve

Basic usage

Use the <GridCanvas> component in your Leptos app: 

use rs_grid_leptos::GridCanvas;

#[component]
fn App() -> impl IntoView {
    view! {
        <GridCanvas
            row_count=1_000_000
            col_count=50
        />
    }
}

Leptos integration

The rs-grid-leptos crate provides a <GridCanvas> component that wraps the full rendering pipeline. It reads the theme from CSS variables defined in rs-grid-theme.css.

Link the theme in your index.html:

<link rel="stylesheet" href="rs-grid-theme.css" />

GridState

GridState is the central data structure. All mutations go through GridState::apply(GridCommand). 

pub struct GridState {
    pub model: GridModel,       // columns + data
    pub viewport: ViewportState, // scroll_x, scroll_y, width, height
    pub selection: SelectionState, // anchor + focus
}

Commands

Mutations are expressed as commands:

grid.apply(GridCommand::ScrollTo {
    x: 0.0,
    y: 500.0,
});

grid.apply(GridCommand::SelectCell {
    row: 42,
    col: 3,
});

Viewport

The viewport state tracks scroll position and visible area. Virtualization ensures only visible cells are rendered. Hit-testing is O(log n) via precomputed column offsets.

Selection

Selection supports cell, row, and column granularity. Multi-range selection uses an anchor + focus model compatible with shift-click and keyboard navigation.

Crates

The workspace is split into focused crates:

  • rs-grid-core — headless logic, no WASM dependency
  • rs-grid-scene — converts GridState to scene primitives
  • rs-grid-render-canvas — Canvas2D renderer
  • rs-grid-web — browser glue (events, DPR, rAF)
  • rs-grid-leptos — Leptos component

Dependencies flow in one direction only: leptos → web → render-canvas → scene → core.

Adding a renderer

To add a new rendering backend:

  1. Create a new crate depending on rs-grid-scene
  2. Consume SceneFrame and iterate over ScenePrimitive
  3. Do not modify rs-grid-core or rs-grid-scene

rs-grid — Rust/WASM data grid engine · GitHub
